name: jobber-pp-mcp
description: Jobber API surface as MCP tools.

jobber_access_token.description: Sets JOBBER_ACCESS_TOKEN for the Jobber MCP server.

jobber_callback_url.description: Sets JOBBER_CALLBACK_URL for the Jobber MCP server.

jobber_client_id.title: JOBBER_CLIENT_ID
jobber_client_id.description: Sets JOBBER_CLIENT_ID for the Jobber MCP server.

jobber_client_secret.title: JOBBER_CLIENT_SECRET
jobber_client_secret.description: Sets JOBBER_CLIENT_SECRET for the Jobber MCP server.

jobber_graphql_version.title: JOBBER_GRAPHQL_VERSION
jobber_graphql_version.description: Sets JOBBER_GRAPHQL_VERSION for the Jobber MCP server.

jobber_refresh_token.title: JOBBER_REFRESH_TOKEN
jobber_refresh_token.description: Sets JOBBER_REFRESH_TOKEN for the Jobber MCP server.
